projects.name: Site Survey Tool
projects.next_milestone: Plan + timeline drafted (planning work happens in that project; timeline TBD until plan exists)
projects.notes: Discovery phase: researching comparable market tools and documenting the current highly manual process before designing a replacement. TopStock Site Survey Documentation session held 6/11. Schema design underway ‚Äî see design_decisions.

design_decisions.title: Spatial hierarchy
design_decisions.detail: Locked hierarchy: Retailer ‚Üí Store ‚Üí Floor ‚Üí Zone ‚Üí optional Aisle ‚Üí Section (= bay). Shelf-level addressing is optional. Shelf indexing convention: bottom shelf = 1, stored as an explicit attribute (not inferred).

design_decisions.title: Three-tier data-model north-star
design_decisions.detail: Data model is three layers: survey (what's physically there) ‚Üí requirement (what a product needs) ‚Üí deployment plan (how a product maps onto the surveyed space). Anchor-tag placement is deployment-layer interpretation and is explicitly out of survey capture scope.

design_decisions.title: Product-agnostic survey schema
design_decisions.detail: Survey schema is deliberately product-agnostic as a forcing function ‚Äî it captures the space, not any one product's needs. Product-specific requirements are deferred to an additive layer that references the survey rather than being baked into capture.

changelog.entry: Tracker initialized. In planning; no committed dates yet.
Locked schema Decision 1 ‚Äî spatial hierarchy: Retailer‚ÜíStore‚ÜíFloor‚ÜíZone‚Üíoptional Aisle‚ÜíSection(=bay), optional shelf-level addressing, bottom=1 shelf indexing stored as an attribute.
Defined three-tier data-model north-star (survey ‚Üí requirement ‚Üí deployment plan); anchor-tag placement scoped as deployment-layer interpretation, out of capture scope.
Established product-agnostic survey schema as a deliberate forcing function; product requirements deferred to an additive layer referencing the survey.

carry_forwards.item: Blink ID reliability escalation ‚Äî random, non-reproducible ESL misses with no command acknowledgement, retry, or event-level traceability
carry_forwards.rule: Active escalation. Carries forward weekly until resolved.

recurring_deliverables.name: Weekly leadership slide
recurring_deliverables.standard: Thaddeus directive: single slide, max 200 words, delete unused boxes, relevance over completeness

recurring_deliverables.name: Weekly recap email
recurring_deliverables.standard: Subject format: Weekly Recap | [Date] | Product Implementation. SharePoint links left as [LINK] placeholders.

operating_principles: Deployment-to-results: every performance result tied to a specific deployment config (this config = this performance = this cost)
Unresolved gaps carry forward every week without exception, flagged until nauseating
